title: The Zurich Engagement
writer: Barbara Noack, Heinz Pauck, Helmut Käutner
actors: Liselotte Pulver, Paul Hubschmid, Bernhard Wicki
plot: Juliane Thomas is an ambitious but unemployed young writer. After breaking up with her lover she works at a dentist friend's to make ends meet. One day she instantly falls in love with one of the patients (Jean Berner) and promptl...
